pki.schema.all.reason: The format enumerator routes to the still-experimental TSP/OCSP/attribute-cert parsers; marking it stable would freeze their return shapes and continued registration into a stable contract. Graduate once every routed format is stable.

pki.schema.parse.reason: The auto-routing dispatcher's stable contract would include the still-experimental TSP/OCSP/attribute-cert return shapes it routes to, so an allowed change to any of those would break callers of a stable schema.parse. Graduate once every routed format is stable.
